rounds.revealFact: Harriet Tubman escaped slavery and then made repeated missions to rescue enslaved people via the Underground Railroad.

clues: A combined American and French force forced a British surrender.
Fought in Virginia in 1781, effectively ending the Revolutionary War.

events.label: The Congress of Vienna redraws the map of Europe
Slavery is abolished throughout the British Empire
Alexander Graham Bell is granted a patent for the telephone
Women gain the right to vote across the United States

followUpQuestion.prompt: What conflict did this mark the end of, for the United States?

rounds.prompt: The first modern Olympic Games open in Athens.
rounds.revealFact: Just 14 nations and around 240 athletes, all men, competed in the first modern Games.

image.alt: Weathered grey stone temple towers reflected in a still moat, framed by palm trees

rounds.revealFact: Built in the 12th century by the Khmer Empire, Angkor Wat is the largest religious monument in the world.
